query: SELECT COUNT(*) as active_players FROM players WHERE totalPuzzles > 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN totalPuzzles > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN totalPuzzles = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((totalCorrect / totalPuzzles) * 100) END DESC, totalPuzzles DESC LIMIT 500;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as active_players FROM players WHERE totalPuzzles > 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN totalPuzzles > 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN totalPuzzles = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((totalCorrect / totalPuzzles) * 100) END DESC, totalPuzzles DESC LIMIT 500;
